nasb.text: Take wives and become the fathers of sons and daughters, and take wives for your sons and give your daughters to husbands, that they may bear sons and daughters; and multiply there and do not decrease.

esv.text: Take wives and have sons and daughters; take wives for your sons, and give your daughters in marriage, that they may bear sons and daughters; multiply there, and do not decrease.

cnv.text: 你們要娶妻，生養兒女；要為你們的兒子娶媳婦，把你們的女兒出嫁，好讓他們也生養兒女。你們要在那裡增多，不可減少。

ccb.text: 你们要娶妻生子，也要给你们的儿女娶妻选夫，使他们生儿育女，你们好在那里人丁兴旺，不致人口减少。
